channel.title: Earnings-Shock on Archive 03
channel.description: Recent content in Earnings-Shock on Archive 03

item.title: Coherent ($COHR) Just Plummeted. Is This a Buying Opportunity?
item.description: Coherent ($COHR), an AI beneficiary that had been gaining attention as a new addition to Stanley Druckenmiller’s portfolio, plummeted 16% after announcing disappointing guidance. Amidst a tense debate between the positive view that the AI growth story remains valid and the negative view that the slump in its traditional business divisions is a warning sign, we analyze whether this sharp drop is a golden buying opportunity.
